steps.title: Find one third of females
steps.content:
The table shows $180$ female penguins total. One third of that total is
$$\frac{1}{3}\cdot180=60$$

steps.title: Compare female counts
steps.content: The female counts are $59$, $27$, $54$, and $40$. Their distances from $60$ are $1$, $33$, $6$, and $20$, respectively. The closest count is $59$, for chinstrap penguins. The answer is A.
